name: HEARING AID POST-FITTING FOLLOW-UP SERVICES, UNILATERAL OR BILATERAL, INCLUDING CONFIRMATION OF PHYSICAL FIT, VALIDATION OF PATIENT BENEFIT AND PERFORMANCE, SOUND QUALITY OF DEVICE, ADJUSTMENT(S) (EG, VERIFICATION, PROGRAMMING ADJUSTMENT[S], DEVICE CONNECTION[S], AND DEVICE TRAINING), AS INDICATED, AND, WHEN PERFORMED, HEARING ASSISTIVE DEVICE, SUPPLEMENTAL TECHNOLOGY FITTING SERVICES; EACH ADDITIONAL 15 MINUTES (LIST SEPARATELY IN ADDITION TO CODE FOR PRIMARY PROCEDURE)

descriptions: HEARING AID POST-FITTING FOLLOW-UP SERVICES, UNILATERAL OR BILATERAL, INCLUDING CONFIRMATION OF PHYSICAL FIT, VALIDATION OF PATIENT BENEFIT AND PERFORMANCE, SOUND QUALITY OF DEVICE, ADJUSTMENT(S) (EG, VERIFICATION, PROGRAMMING ADJUSTMENT[S], DEVICE CONNECTION[S], AND DEVICE TRAINING), AS INDICATED, AND, WHEN PERFORMED, HEARING ASSISTIVE DEVICE, SUPPLEMENTAL TECHNOLOGY FITTING SERVICES; EACH ADDITIONAL 15 MINUTES (LIST SEPARATELY IN ADDITION TO CODE FOR PRIMARY PROCEDURE)
